mapper.select: SELECT TOP 1 biostar_ip, biostar_id, biostar_pw, reg_dt, mod_dt FROM tb_system
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_system (biostar_ip, biostar_id, biostar_pw) VALUES (#{biostarIp}, #{biostarId}, #{biostarPw})
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_system SET biostar_ip = #{biostarIp}, biostar_id = #{biostarId}, biostar_pw = #{biostarPw}, mod_dt = getdate()
